title: Microstructural development of human newborn cerebral white matter
text: Diffusion tensor MRI was applied to measure white matter development in newborn infants.

title: Induction of myelodysplasia by myeloid-derived suppressor cells
text: The study reports a role for myeloid-derived suppressor cells in marrow dysfunction.

title: Vitamin D and fracture healing
text: Vitamin D supplementation was assessed for its effect on fracture healing time.

title: Probiotics and irritable bowel syndrome
text: Probiotics were tested for symptom relief in irritable bowel syndrome.

title: Exercise and blood pressure
text: Regular exercise was associated with lower blood pressure in adults.
